news.paragraph: Silver prices saw a modest increase as market participants considered the potential implications of an Iran deal and ongoing inflation concerns. These geopolitical and macroeconomic factors are currently driving sentiment in the precious metals market. Traders should monitor developments related to the Iran deal and inflation data for potential shifts in price direction.

headlines.title: Gold Inches Up as Traders Weigh Iran Deal Prospects, Inflation
